scene_captions.caption: A steady flow of traffic moves across the frame as forty-eight cars, nine trucks, and three buses travel significant distances, while three motorcycles and two stationary people remain largely in place.
A high volume of cars, trucks, and buses travel across the frame while a few motorcycles move slightly and two stationary people remain in the vicinity.
A high volume of cars, trucks, and buses travel across the frame while motorcycles move shorter distances and two stationary people remain in the vicinity.
A steady stream of cars, trucks, and buses travels across the frame while a few motorcycles and stationary people are positioned nearby.

global_caption: This video captured a continuous flow of heavy traffic moving along a busy roadway over a period of approximately eighty seconds. The scene was dominated by a high volume of passenger vehicles, commercial trucks, and buses traveling across the frame, while a smaller number of motorcycles and pedestrians remained relatively stationary. The consistent movement patterns across all four scenes indicated a steady, uninterrupted stream of transit throughout the duration of the recording.
